articles.title: Prime Lending Rates Dip: If You Have Excellent Credit, Now May Be The Best Time To Get A Loan
articles.summary: With over a dozen credit cards and millions of credit card points racked up, Nancy Jiang condenses the complex world of card-churning for maximum rewards with minimum effort. Her work has been featured in national publications such as The US Sun.

articles.title: Fifth Third Bank to Decrease Prime Lending Rate to 7.25%
articles.summary: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Fifth Third Bank, National Association (Nasdaq: FITB) today announced it will decrease its prime lending rate to 7.25%, effective immediately. The rate was last changed on December 18, 2024, when Fifth Third decreased its ...

articles.title: Regions Bank Reduces its Prime Lending Rate
articles.summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Regions Bank today announced it is reducing the Regions prime lending rate to 6.75% from 7.00%, effective Thursday, Dec. 11, 2025. About Regions Financial Corporation (RF) Regions Financial Corporation, with $160 billion ...

articles.title: Fifth Third Bank to Decrease Prime Lending Rate to 6.75%
articles.summary: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Fifth Third Bank, National Association (Nasdaq: FITB) today announced it will decrease its prime lending rate to 6.75%, effective immediately. The rate was last changed on October 29, 2025, when Fifth Third decreased its prime ...

articles.title: Tennessee Commissioner of Financial Institutions Sets New Interest Rate at 10.75%
articles.summary: Tennessee's effective maximum interest rate is set at 10.75% per annum as of January 27, 2026, linked to the Federal Reserve's average prime loan rate.
